title: Extra Dynamics (Legacy Dynamic Surroundings Sound Pack)
description: Immerse yourself in Minecraft's lifelike soundscapes with a simple resource pack.
body:
📖About

Extra Dynamics is a fork of AS12's Dynamic Surroundings resource pack  for 1.12 which is based on OreCruncher's original Dynamic Surroundings mod.

Extra Dynamics has  over 800 sounds (with extra additional sounds) for  vanilla  and mods.

The  very mods compatible with Extra Dynamics  includes:

- [Scape and Run: Parasites by Dhanatry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/scape-and-run-parasites)
- [Traders Backport by SmileyCorp](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/traders-backport)
- [Deeper Depths (also) by SmileyCorp](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/deeper-depths)
- [Future MC by TheDarkColour](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/future-mc)
- [Oceanic Expanse by Sir_Squid1y](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oceanic-expanse)
- [Unseen's Nether Backport by jboymercs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/unseens-nether-backport)

And more to come in the near future!

If you have any mods to get the Dynamic Surroundings treatment, I am open for suggestions.

📌Notes

- Don't spawn too many mobs around you (The way this sounds pack work is naturally/Not that way)
- Best experience with headphones🎧
- The ambient sounds not work like any other mods. It only alters Minecraft's original sounds with simple codes.
- This pack is only for players who enjoy sounds while playing the game.

✉️Credits

[Dynamic Surroundings Sounds Pack by AS12](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/dynamic-surroundings-remastered)

[Dynamic Surroundings by OreCruncher](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-surroundings)

[Cave Dweller Sound Overhaul by Scorchy](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cave-dweller-sound-overhaul)

[Corpse Stalker sounds by Flamc04](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-corpse-stalker-cave-dweller-mod)

Various other Sound Effects used are from free sound effect websites

Fork by Vanity Project
